'''''Pizzazz'' 15''' is the fifteenth issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[December]] [[1978]] and featured the continuation of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Kingdom of Ice]]''.<ref name="Issue 15" />

This issue also include the article "The Seers Catalog of Robots," a humorous look at the history of robots in science fiction films, including [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]].<ref name="Issue 15" />
